title: One system that watches the charts, scans the news, and backtests 10 strategies for me.
author: Next-Syrup6935
selftext:
I’ve been trading since 2016 and working as a software engineer since 2009, and combining those two worlds with AI has turned out to make me a lot of money.

I spent a long time experimenting with a spider-web of connected signals to build something as precise as possible. What started as just an “indicator” has often ended up saving me in real trades.

It combines **10 proven trading strategies** into one unified model:

* Pulls in real-time news & social media sentiment
* Runs backtests to validate trade setups
* Evaluates chart patterns & market structure
* Generates a trade plan with: Expected success rate (%), AI confidence score, Risk management, Entry, Stop, and Targets

I’ve been running the current model for the past two months, and I’m genuinely happy with it, it consistently catches things I’d normally miss and saves me a huge amount of time.

https://preview.redd.it/pegdj9v8q5tf1.png?width=1017&format=png&auto=webp&s=bc69b31af965ccbe3ab364884108d1ee1c7df681

  
See more [examples](http://tickrad.com/examples)

comments.author: MochaLatte247
comments.body: Good for you man! Are you still trading paper or are you running for real?

replies.author: Next-Syrup6935
replies.body: Well, never been paper trading.. But never followed this blindly.. It's more of a confirmation indicator to me.

comments.author: jp1261987
comments.body: What did you build in? What services did you use?

replies.author: Next-Syrup6935
replies.body: Not exactly a service.. Pytorch was used to build the model.. It's quite a complex web of things happening with the help of X's api for socials, different api for news. It's quite deep how things are puzzled together.

comments.author: AbortedFajitas
comments.body: If you want to algo trade for real I am looking for a partner. I have my own data center and plenty of resources for operations. I have been trading markets for 10+ years and deep into system trading research and dev for 6 years or so. Looking for someone to help me obtain and curate time series data, do research/testing, and run trade execution platform etc. let's talk!

replies.author: navyet08
replies.body: Tell me you live in the NW burbs of Chicago and "looking for a helper" 🤣
